name: Cool and Creamy Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper Preparation Time: 0:15 Heat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
Prepare pie crust. Brush with beaten egg white. In a small bowl, combine sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over the crust. Bake at 450 degrees for 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool completely. In a small bowl, beat whipping cream until stiff peaks form. In a large bowl, combine pudding mix, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, milk, and pumpkin puree; mix well. Fold in 1 cup of whipped cream. Pour into the cooled, baked crust. Top with remaining whipped cream. Sprinkle with toasted coconut flakes. Tip: To toast coconut, spread on a cookie sheet; bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 3 to 5 minutes or until light golden brown, stirring occasionally.
